utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Each section is fully detailed: (1) property includes type, location, bedrooms, bathrooms, price, currency, features, and annual taxes; (2) financing includes method, down payment, mortgage details, interest rate, term, and fees; (3) legal_services includes legal fees, survey costs, package type, total cost; (4) moving_services includes cost, service level, packing/unpacking details; (5) setup_services includes total cost, included services, and setup time; (6) total_budget includes property price, initial cash, closing costs, moving/setup costs, total upfront cost, annual costs, and currency. Therefore, all six required items are covered and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution shows a purchased detached house in North York, Toronto priced at CAD $720,000 with 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the one that fits this description and price range closest is the 'Historic Townhouse' (price CAD $750K, rating 6). The financing method used is a mortgage with an arrangement fee of CAD $1200, which matches 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9). The legal package used is 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The survey cost listed is CAD $300, which corresponds to 'Basic Survey' (rating 7). The moving service cost (CAD $650) matches 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). The utility setup total is CAD $280, which corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
